MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William J. White, Esq. & Joseph Petta, Esq. of Shute, Mihaly & Weinberger LLP, (415-552-7272), for Successor Agency To The Redevelopment Agency of CCSF, Plaintiff and moving party.
Brian F. Crossman, Deputy City Attorney, (415-554-4690), for CCSF, Plaintiff.
John L. Boos, Esq. of K&L Gates, (415-882-8005), for John Lebolt and Richard Lebolt, Defendants and opposing parties.
Reporter Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229, (415-828-1919).

In the commencement of the hearing, Plaintiff and Moving Party summarizes the motion in open court, ON THE RECORD. Court hears arguments from both sides as reported in the reporter's notes.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: PLAINTIFF SUCCESSOR AGENCY TO THE REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is taken under submission. Moving party is instructed to submit proposed order in conformity with the tentative ruling but also allows the moving party to revise some portions in the tentative ruling, subject to compliance of CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229, (415-828-1919), D501.
